tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Chris Daughtry
Album: Leave This Town
Transcribed by The_Grace

Capo 1

[ch]C#m[/ch]  x46654
[ch]A[/ch]    57765x
[ch]E[/ch]    x79997
[ch]B[/ch]    79987x
[ch]F#m[/ch]  24422x
[ch]A[/ch]*   x02220
[ch]B[/ch]*   x24442


[Intro]
[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I'm ten miles from town, and I just broke down[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Spitting out smoke on the side of the road[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
I'm out here alone, just trying to get home[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]
To tell you I was wrong, but you already know[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]*
Believe I won't stop for nothin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]*          [ch]B[/ch]*
To see you so I've started runnin'[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is the love and the laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]

[Mini-Guitar Solo Break]
[ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
The last time we talked, the night that I walked[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Burns like a light in the back of my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
I must've been high, to say you and I[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]B[/ch]
weren't meant to be an' just wasting my time[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]*
Oh, why did I ever doubt you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]*           [ch]B[/ch]*
You know, I will die here without you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is the love and the laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
You and I, right or wrong, there's no other one[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
After this time spent on[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]
It's hard to believe that a man with sight could be so blind[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
Thinkin' 'bout the better times, must've been outta my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
So I'm running back to tell you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
Without you God knows what I'd do, yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is the love and the laughter[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]
After the life we've been through, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
No, there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]
